OKITASABER-MUMYOU_MANUAL.description: #Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage 3 times to one enemy, IGNORING Block; +1 per hit for every 10 NP Charge above !ChargeCost!. Then apply !Vulnerable! Vulnerable.

OKITASABER-MUMYOU_FIRST_THRUST.descripti: #Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage to one enemy, IGNORING Block; +2 for every 10 NP Charge above !ChargeCost!.
OKITASABER-FIVE_FLASHES.title: Five Flashes
OKITASABER-FIVE_FLASHES.description: #Dash 1. Costs 1 *Breath. Deal !D! damage 5 times. If you have a *Critical Ready: consume it and ALL FIVE hits crit.

OKITASABER-GENIUS_CUT.description: #Deal !D! damage. If you have a *Critical Ready: this attack ignores Block.

OKITASABER-BAKUMATSU_FLOWER.description: #Exhaust. Enter your final form permanently: your *Dash cards no longer cost *Breath, but at the end of each turn you gain a *Cough, shuffled into your draw pile.
OKITASABER-FINAL_PROMISE.title: Final Promise
OKITASABER-TO_THE_END.title: To the End
OKITASABER-TO_THE_END.description: #Exhaust. This turn, your *Dash cards cost no *Breath; instead pay 2 HP for each *Breath you would have paid.+ Pay only 1 HP for each.+

OKITASABER-TENNEN_RISHIN_BREATH.descript: #Gain 2 maximum *Breath. You recover 3 *Breath each turn instead of 2.
OKITASABER-MAKOTO.title: Makoto
OKITASABER-MAKOTO.description: #Each time your 100 *Critical *Star threshold triggers: your Attacks deal 2 more this combat, up to a maximum of 10.+ Up to a maximum of 16.+

OKITASABER-BAKUMATSU_SPIRIT.description: #At the start of each turn, gain 1 *Breath, 10 *Critical *Stars and 10 *NP Charge.

OKITASABER-CHERRY_IN_FULL_BLOOM.title: Cherry in Full Bloom
OKITASABER-CHERRY_IN_FULL_BLOOM.descript: #Exhaust. Fill your *Breath to maximum. Gain a *Cough, shuffled into your draw pile.+ No longer gain a *Cough.+
OKITASABER-MUMYOU_UNLEASHED.title: Mumyou Sandanzuki: Unleashed
OKITASABER-MUMYOU_UNLEASHED.description: #Retain. Exhaust. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage 3 times to one enemy, IGNORING Block; +1 per hit for every 10 NP Charge above !ChargeCost!. Then apply !Vulnerable! Vulnerable.
OKITASABER-TOS.title: Cough
OKITASABER-TOS.description: #Ethereal. Unplayable. At the end of your turn, while in your hand: lose 1 *Breath.
